SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:48 am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Wijio Worldwide Studios appears through . No appearance by Respondent. Appellant, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative and responds to questions from Judge Myles.

Procedural issue of timely filing by Appellant discussed.

10:08am
Case dismissed due to untimely filing of documents.
